longFormStreaming.title: Long-form Streaming
longFormStreaming.description: High-quality films, series, dramas, and documentaries.

smartDiscovery.title: Smart Discovery Feed
smartDiscovery.description: Feed adapts using smart suggestions tailored to your viewing habits.

creatorMonetization.title: Creator Monetization
creatorMonetization.description: Earn revenue through ads and global viewership.

watchToEarn.title: Watch-to-Earn Rewards
watchToEarn.description: Earn rewards based on your watch-time and engagement.

malaysiaContent.title: Global Content
malaysiaContent.description: Showcasing local creators to the world.

creatorStudio.title: Creator Upload Studio
creatorStudio.description: Complete dashboard for uploading, managing, and tracking videos.

free.question: Is This App Free?
free.answer: Yes. Ozone will launch as a free platform supported by ads. A premium, ad-free option will be available later.

creatorUpload.question: Will this platform allow creator to upload their video?
creatorUpload.answer: Yes. Creators will be able to upload content after completing a simple verification process.

creatorEarn.question: Will creators earn money on Ozone?
creatorEarn.answer: Yes. Monetization features such as ads, analytics, and rewards will be available for verified creators.

launch.question: When will Ozone officially launch?
launch.answer: We are currently in the preparation and testing phase. Early users who pre-register will be the first to get updates, special premium offers and early access.

recommendation.question: How does Ozone's recommendation system work?
recommendation.answer: Our AI recommendation engine suggests content based on your interests, without disrupting your feed or overwhelming you with irrelevant content.

watchToEarn.question: What is Watch-to-Earn on Ozone?
watchToEarn.answer: Watch-to-Earn lets viewers collect tokens every time they watch or engage with content. Over time, tokens can be exchanged for rewards or cashed out once you hit the minimum amount.

aim.title: Our
aim.description1: Experience the first global streaming revolution -
aim.description4: Join thousands waiting for early access. Your input helps shape the platform.

lim.name: Lim
lim.title: UI/UX Designer Lead
lim.quote: Landing to peak your interest, explore it like you're an adventurer. Welcome to Ozone.

maza.name: Maza
maza.title: Junior Frontend App Developer
maza.quote: A new atmosphere for streaming, built for you.

popeyes.title: Popeyes
popeyes.description: A goofy sailor gains super strength from spinach to tackle trouble and protect his friends in hilarious adventures.

ramlee.title: Laksamana Do Re Mi
ramlee.description: Three humble friends are mistakenly hailed as heroic admirals, leading to a chain of hilarious misunderstandings, clever satire, and unexpected heroism.

nold.title: Night Of The Living Dead
nold.description: When the dead mysteriously rise and attack the living, a group of strangers barricade themselves inside a farmhouse, struggling to survive a night of relentless terror.

veera.title: Enga Veettu Pillai
veera.description: Separated at birth, twin brothers raised in contrasting worlds reunite to confront injustice, restore family honor, and triumph over evil.

sherlock.title: Sherlock Jr.
sherlock.description: A humble projectionist dreams himself into a detective movie, where he becomes a brilliant sleuth to solve a crime and win the woman he loves.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: Ozone by OC Global Technology respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you visit our website or submit a preregistration form.

sections.title: 1) Information we collect
items: Information you provide through preregistration forms, including name, email, role (creator/viewer), and any other details you choose to share.
For some forms, we may also collect phone number, country, content interests, devices, or viewing preferences.
Your language preference may be stored locally in your browser (localStorage) for a consistent experience.

sections.title: 2) How we use your information
items: To manage early user interest for Ozone and support product launch planning.
To contact you with updates about early access, product information, or collaboration opportunities.
To analyze aggregate trends and improve platform experience and communication.

sections.title: 3) Data storage and security
items: Form data is stored using Firebase/Firestore infrastructure.
We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or changes.
However, no method of transmission or storage over the internet can be guaranteed to be fully secure.

sections.title: 4) Information sharing
items: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
Data may be processed by technology service providers used to operate the website (for example, hosting and infrastructure), with appropriate security requirements.
We may disclose information if required by law or valid legal process.

sections.title: 5) Data retention
items: Your information is retained as long as needed for operations, interest analysis, and product-related communication.
We may delete or anonymize data when no longer required, subject to legal obligations.

sections.title: 6) Your rights
items: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of personal data you submitted to us.
You may also withdraw consent for marketing communications at any time.

sections.title: 7) Third-party links
items: This website may include links to external platforms (for example, social media).
Third-party privacy practices are separate, and we encourage you to review their policies directly.

sections.title: 8) Updates to this policy
items: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time to reflect service or legal changes.
The latest version will always be available on this page together with its effective date.

contact.title: 9) Contact us
contact.description: If you have questions about privacy or would like to make a data request, please contact us at:

termsConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsConditions.intro: By accessing or using Ozone websites and preregistration forms, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of our services.

sections.title: 1) Acceptance of terms
items: These terms apply to all visitors and users of Ozone digital properties.
You are responsible for reviewing these terms periodically for updates.
Continued use after updates means you accept the revised terms.

sections.title: 2) Eligibility and user responsibilities
items: You agree to provide accurate and up-to-date information in all forms.
You must not use the website for unlawful, abusive, or fraudulent activities.
You are responsible for keeping your submitted information truthful and lawful.

sections.title: 3) Preregistration and communication
items: Preregistration does not guarantee product availability, launch date, or account approval.
We may contact you regarding early access, product updates, and related announcements.
You may opt out of marketing communication where applicable.

sections.title: 4) Intellectual property
items: All branding, logos, design elements, and website content are owned by Ozone/OC Global Technology or used with permission.
You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or commercially exploit our materials without prior written consent.

sections.title: 5) Prohibited conduct
items: You must not attempt unauthorized access, reverse engineering, scraping, or disruption of our systems.
You must not submit malicious code, spam, or content that violates any applicable law.

sections.title: 6) Third-party services and links
items: Our website may include links to third-party services (for example, social media platforms).
We are not responsible for third-party content, availability, or terms.
Your use of third-party services is governed by their own policies.

sections.title: 7) Disclaimer and limitation of liability
items: Website and preregistration services are provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, we do not guarantee uninterrupted service or error-free operation.
We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the website.

sections.title: 8) Changes and termination
items: We may modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the website or service at any time.
We may update these Terms & Conditions from time to time, and updates take effect once published on this page.

contact.title: 9) Contact us
contact.description: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at:

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Ozone by OC Global Technology uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website.

sections.title: 1) What are cookies?
items: Cookies are small text files stored on your browser or device when you visit a website.
They help websites remember preferences, improve performance, and understand usage patterns.

sections.title: 2) Types of cookies we may use
items: Essential cookies: required for core website functions and security.
Preference cookies: remember settings such as language selection.
Analytics cookies: help us understand traffic and improve the user experience.

sections.title: 3) How we use cookies
items: To keep the website functioning properly.
To remember your preferred language and improve consistency across visits.
To analyze general usage trends and optimize content and performance.

sections.title: 4) Third-party cookies
items: Some third-party services linked from our website may place their own cookies.
We do not control third-party cookie behavior; please review their own cookie or privacy policies.

sections.title: 5) Managing cookies
items: You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings.
Blocking certain cookies may affect website features and your browsing experience.

sections.title: 6) Policy updates
items: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect legal or service changes.
The latest version will always be available on this page with its effective date.

contact.title: 7) Contact us
contact.description: If you have questions about our use of cookies, contact us at:

cookieBanner.title: We use cookies
cookieBanner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, remember language preferences, and analyze site traffic.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: Shaping the next generation of streaming experiences.
aboutUs.intro: Ozone by OC Global Technology is built to bring movies, creators, and audiences together in one smart and inclusive ecosystem.
aboutUs.visionText: To become a trusted global streaming ecosystem where meaningful stories, creator opportunities, and smart technology come together for everyone.

values.title: Creator-first Innovation
values.description: We build features that give creators practical tools to publish, grow, monetize, and connect with audiences globally.

values.title: Audience-centered Experience
values.description: We prioritize discovery quality, relevance, and smooth viewing so audiences can enjoy content that truly matches their interests.

values.title: Responsible Growth
values.description: We scale with integrity, balancing product speed, platform safety, and long-term value for users and partners.

milestones.title: Concept and product framing
milestones.description: Initial product scope and value proposition were defined with a focus on creators, long-form content, and AI-assisted discovery.

milestones.title: Landing experience and preregistration
milestones.description: Public-facing brand site and multilingual preregistration flows were launched to validate audience demand and creator interest.

milestones.title: Platform readiness and ecosystem building
milestones.description: Core experience, legal readiness, and partner workflows are being strengthened ahead of broader product rollout.

aboutUs.contactDescription: For partnership, media, or collaboration opportunities, reach out to us at:

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.subtitle: Let's build the future of streaming together.
contactUs.intro: Whether you are a creator, a brand, or a potential partner, we are happy to connect. Reach out and our team will get back to you.

cards.title: Partnerships
cards.content: For strategic partnerships, campaign collaboration, and cross-platform opportunities.

cards.title: Media & Press
cards.content: For press inquiries, interviews, and official media requests about Ozone.

cards.title: Creator Support
cards.content: For creator onboarding, platform feature questions, and growth opportunities.

cards.title: General Inquiry
cards.content: For any other questions about Ozone, product updates, or the preregistration process.
